titleStmt.title: SII 38.284: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 284. (A.R. No. 284 of 1912.) ŚIVANKŪḌAL, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Śivakoḻunḍīśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. Begins with the meykirtti of the king, Pugaḻ-sūḻnda puṇari. It records the sale of three hundred and sixty kuḻi of land by the sabhā of Śivankūḍal apparently to the temple in the village, after receiving both the pricemoney and tax-money. The sabhā agreed to remit taxes such as kuḍimai and other taxes levied on the land. The madhyastha of the village Śivankūḍaluḍaiyan Ayyāṟan Paḷḷikoṇḍān figure as signatory at the behest of the village assembly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻn=tapuṇari Akaḻ
cūḻn=ta puviyuḷ ponṉemi AḷaThe letter ‘ḷa’ is found engraved below.vum tannemi
naṭappa viḷaṅka cayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc ca
kkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇa
rntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākattu vuriayilmuṉai
k kun=taḷavaracar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟaiy kaḻittu to
ḷvali kāṭṭip porparinaṭāttik kirttiyai ni
ṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭittenticait temaru kamalap
pūmakaḷ potumaiyum poṉniyāṭai naṉnilap pāvai tanimai
yun=tirvantu punitat tirumaṇimakuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi tannaṭiyiraṇṭu
ṭa muṭiyākat tonnilaven=tar cūṭa munṉai peṟuka kaliyāṟu
vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai In the same line another fragmentary inscription by the side is engraved. It runs as follows. 1 ṟuṭu ••••• ṭṭu koṭṭa •••••• 2 ḷur nāṭṭu civakūṭal sabhaiyomum 3 veḷḷāḷaromum eṅkaḷur devar civa[k]o 4 ḻun=tāṇṭārkku oru tirinun=tāviḷakkukku •••••• 5 kac celakoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭutta ••••••• 6 �vatu teṟkkil periyeri kiḻkuṭa •••••••••
tu tirumati veṇṇilāt tikaḻaha O
tum pūpālar tiṟai viṭutan=ta kaṭāñ
talaittiṭattu ponnakarppuṟatti
tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai
Uṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅkace
ṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭa
�rākośamanṟi Innilañcuṭṭivan=ta kuṭimai
kaḷ Epperpaṭṭanavum nāṅkaḷe Iṟuttu
Iddharmam cantrātittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomāka
Ippaṭi Icaintu viṟṟukkuṭuttom civaṉ
kūṭal mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭi I
ṭṭa nilam patinaṟucāṇ kolāl kuḻi munnūṟṟaṟupatu mikutik kuṟaivu Uḷḷa
ṭaṅka viṟṟu Innilattāl van=ta vilaidravyamum Iṟaidravyamum Anumāna kośamin
ṟippeṟu vilaikkāṇaṅkiḻikaic cellap poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu Iṟai Iḻicci I
n nilattāl van=ta Iṟai Epperpaṭṭatum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkak kaṭavomāka viṟṟukku
ṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭi Ivarkaḷ paṇiyil Eḻutinen Ivvūr
madhyastan civakūṭaluṭaiyān Ayyāṟan paḷḷikoṇṭānen Ivai En Eḻuttu
Innāḷāl Im ṟku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭattuk kanṉūrnāṭṭuk kāntūrū
Digital edition of SII 38.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
